dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8719 IH: Shared Micromobility Investment Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Hoyle of Oregon introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend titles 23 and 49, United States Code, to provide eligibility for shared micromobility projects to receive funding under certain surface transportation programs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Shared Micromobility Investment Act.

section.header: Eligibility of shared micromobility projects for funding under certain surface transportation programs

subsection.text: Section 133(b) of title 23, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: Shared micromobility projects (including investments in bikesharing or shared-scooter systems).

subsection.text: Section 175(c)(1) of title 23, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (L), by striking and at the end;
in subparagraph (M), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.text: a shared micromobility project (including investments in bikesharing or shared-scooter systems).

subsection.text: Section 6702(a)(3) of title 49, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (G), by striking and at the end;
by redesignating subparagraph (H) as subparagraph (I); and
by inserting after subparagraph (G) the following:

subparagraph.text: a shared micromobility project (including investments in bikesharing or shared-scooter systems); and
